candidate_definition_hints.text: An official lightweight library for the RaBitQ algorithm and its applications in vector search.
> **New:** We have recently open-sourced the GPU implementation of RaBitQ for high-dimensional vector search. See [cuvs_rabitq](https://github.com/Stardust-SJF/cuvs_rabitq/tree/cuvs_ivf_rabitq).

candidate_glosses.text: > **New:** We have recently open-sourced the GPU implementation of RaBitQ for high-dimensional vector search. See [cuvs_rabitq](https://github.com/Stardust-SJF/cuvs_rabitq/tree/cuvs_ivf_rabitq).
